ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Unrecognised format. Expected dd/mm/yyyy or yyyy-mm-dd.
ast.target: 无法识别的格式。请使用 dd/mm/yyyy 或 yyyy-mm-dd。

ast.name: textContent
ast.target: 完成 — 未发现缺失文件

ast.name: title
ast.source: A group is selected — cannot move groups into other groups
ast.target: 已选中一个组 — 无法将组移入其他组

ast.name: title
ast.target: 从即将观看列表中移除

ast.name: title
ast.source: Personal task marker (does not affect watchlog data)
ast.target: 个人任务标记（不影响观看日志数据）

ast.name: error
ast.source: WatchLog: failed to save custom list
ast.target: WatchLog: 保存自定义列表失败

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Which tab opens when you launch the watchlog panel.
ast.target: 启动观看日志面板时打开哪个选项卡。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose between ring charts or rectangular stat cards on the dashboard.
ast.target: 在仪表盘上选择环形图表或矩形统计卡片。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Absolute: episodes numbered 1→n across all seasons. Per season: each season restarts from 1 (display only, data is unchanged).
ast.target: 绝对：所有季中剧集编号为 1→n。按季：每季从 1 重新开始（仅显示，数据不变）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Mark status as completed when all episodes are watched.
ast.target: 当所有剧集都已观看时，将状态标记为已完成。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Record today's date as the finish date when a title is completed.
ast.target: 当标题完成时，将今天的日期记录为完成日期。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show type and status badges with their configured colors. Disable for a plain text style.
ast.target: 显示带有配置颜色的类型和状态徽章。禁用则为纯文本样式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Export all watchlog data into a single timestamped .JSON file.
ast.target: 将所有观看日志数据导出到一个带时间戳的 .JSON 文件中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Restore all watchlog data from a .JSON backup file. Current data will be replaced.
ast.target: 从 .JSON 备份文件恢复所有观看日志数据。当前数据将被替换。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Creates missing .md files for titles that don't have one. Existing files are not modified.
ast.target: 为没有 .md 文件的标题创建缺失的文件。现有文件不会被修改。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Export selected titles as a CSV file.
ast.target: 将所选标题导出为 CSV 文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Import titles from a CSV file. Duplicates are highlighted before import.
ast.target: 从 CSV 文件导入标题。导入前会高亮显示重复项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Which API to use for movies and tv shows.
ast.target: 用于电影和电视节目的 API。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault folder where watchlog Markdown files are stored.
ast.target: 存储观看日志 Markdown 文件的保险库文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically create type subfolders on plugin load.
ast.target: 在插件加载时自动创建类型子文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Manually trigger folder creation for all current types.
ast.target: 手动触发为所有当前类型创建文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Lines containing this tag followed by a title will appear in the drafts tab.
ast.target: 包含此标签后跟标题的行将出现在草稿选项卡中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: What happens to a draft entry once you hit add and confirm.
ast.target: 当您点击添加并确认后，草稿条目会发生什么。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault folder where custom list files are stored.
ast.target: 存储自定义列表文件的保险库文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Columns pre-populated when creating a new list. The name column is always included.
ast.target: 创建新列表时预填充的列。名称列始终包含在内。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Manually create the custom lists folder in the vault.
ast.target: 手动在保险库中创建自定义列表文件夹。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 自定义列表文件夹路径

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Search for a title to insert...

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Search failed. Check your connection and API settings.
ast.target: 搜索失败。请检查您的网络连接和API设置。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No external link set for this title.
ast.target: 此标题未设置外部链接。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No titles in your watchlog library yet.
ast.target: 您的观看日志库中暂无标题。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: All titles are already in upcoming.
ast.target: 所有标题都已在即将观看列表中。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Time must be in 24h format: hh:mm (e.g. 14:50)
ast.target: 时间必须为24小时制格式：hh:mm（例如14:50）

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Invalid backup file — could not parse JSON.
ast.target: 无效的备份文件——无法解析JSON。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Invalid backup file — missing required fields.
ast.target: 无效的备份文件——缺少必填字段。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 自定义列表文件夹已创建。

ast.name: body
ast.source: Statuses To be released or Dropped (time left) are not included in any calculations, only Watching, Completed and Dropped (time watched).
ast.target: 状态为“待发布”或“已弃坑（剩余时间）”的标题不纳入任何计算，仅计算“观看中”、“已完成”和“已弃坑（已观看时间）”的标题。

ast.name: body
ast.source: Calculated as: episodes watched × episode duration, summed across all titles with status Watching and Completed.
ast.target: 计算方式为：已观看集数 × 单集时长，对所有状态为“观看中”和“已完成”的标题求和。

ast.name: body
ast.source: Calculated as: episodes remaining × episode duration, summed across all titles with status Watching and Plan to Watch.
ast.target: 计算方式为：剩余集数 × 单集时长，对所有状态为“观看中”和“计划观看”的标题求和。

ast.name: body
ast.source: Calculated as: episodes watched × episode duration, summed across all titles with status Dropped.
ast.target: 计算方式为：已观看集数 × 单集时长，对所有状态为“已弃坑”的标题求和。

ast.name: body
ast.source: Groups let you combine related titles under one entry; for example, a movie and its sequel, a TV show and its anime adaptation, or an anime series and its movie. They appear as a single collapsible row in your Watchlist.
ast.target: 分组功能允许您将相关标题合并到一个条目下；例如，一部电影及其续集、一部电视剧及其动画改编作品，或一个动画系列及其剧场版。它们在您的观看列表中显示为单个可折叠行。

ast.name: body
ast.source: A group's rating is automatically calculated as the average of all individual title ratings within it.
ast.target: 分组的评分自动计算为组内所有单个标题评分的平均值。

ast.name: body
ast.source: Pinning a title moves it to the top of your Watchlist regardless of sorting. Pinned titles also appear in the Now Watching widget, so you can quickly see what you're currently watching inside your notes or Homepage.
ast.target: 置顶标题会将其移至观看列表顶部，不受排序影响。置顶标题也会出现在“正在观看”小部件中，方便您在笔记或主页中快速查看当前正在观看的内容。

ast.name: body
ast.source: Open the title and click Edit at the bottom. In the Edit modal, scroll down to the Seasons field and add a new line in the format "Season Name: N" (e.g. "Season 3: 10" or "Season name: 10").
ast.target: 打开标题并点击底部的“编辑”。在编辑模态框中，向下滚动到“季数”字段，并按格式“季名: N”（例如“第3季: 10”或“季名: 10”）添加新行。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Track a specific title inline — shows type, status, progress, and a "next episode" checkbox.
ast.target: 内联追踪特定标题——显示类型、状态、进度和“下一集”复选框。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Track a specific title inline (full card).
ast.target: 内联追踪特定标题（完整卡片）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Completed titles count — compact inline stat card.
ast.target: 已完成标题计数——紧凑型内联统计卡片。

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 已观看时间与剩余时间合并显示（迷你版）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Next upcoming title with name, type badge, release date, and countdown.
ast.target: 下一个即将上映的标题，包含名称、类型徽章、发布日期和倒计时。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Currently pinned title with name, type badge, and progress bar.
ast.target: 当前置顶的标题，包含名称、类型徽章和进度条。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Full-width triple card: Time Watched · Time Remaining · Completed.
ast.target: 全宽三联卡片：已观看时间 · 剩余时间 · 已完成。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Full-width double card: Now Watching · Up Next.
ast.target: 全宽双联卡片：正在观看 · 即将观看。

ast.name: heading
ast.source: How to add a new season

ast.name: heading
ast.target: 动画 vs 电影与电视剧

ast.name: name
ast.target: wl-todo mini — 追踪标题（紧凑）

ast.name: name
ast.target: wl-stat: watched — 已观看时间（迷你）

ast.name: name
ast.target: wl-stat: completed — 已完成标题（迷你）

ast.name: name
ast.target: wl-stat: remaining — 剩余时间（迷你）

ast.name: name
ast.target: wl-stat: time — 已观看 + 剩余（迷你）

ast.name: name
ast.target: wl-upcoming: next — 下一个即将播出（迷你）

ast.name: name
ast.source: wl-stat: time completed full — Time · Remaining · Completed card
ast.target: wl-stat: time completed full — 时间 · 剩余 · 已完成卡片

ast.name: name
ast.source: wl-now-next — Now Watching + Up Next card
ast.target: wl-now-next — 正在观看 + 接下来卡片

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: Add notes, links, or any text here...
ast.target: 在此处添加笔记、链接或任何文本...

ast.name: text
ast.source: Don't know what to watch next?
ast.target: 不知道接下来该看什么？

ast.name: text
ast.source: No titles in your library yet.

ast.name: text
ast.source: Please enter an IMDb URL (e.g. https://www.imdb.com/title/tt1375666/)
ast.target: 请输入一个 IMDb URL（例如 https://www.imdb.com/title/tt1375666/）

ast.name: text
ast.target: 每行一个：“季名称: N”（例如 “第1季: 12”）

ast.name: text
ast.source: Note: when adding a new season, remember to update "Total Episodes" so progress calculates correctly.
ast.target: 注意：添加新季时，请记得更新“总集数”，以便正确计算进度。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No history yet. Actions in the Watchlist will appear here.
ast.target: 暂无历史记录。观看列表中的操作将显示在此处。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 没有标题匹配您的筛选器。

ast.name: text
ast.source: ⚠ All titles with a release date in the future will be automatically marked as "To be released" in Watchlist and added here.
ast.target: ⚠ 所有未来发行日期的标题将在观看列表中自动标记为“待发行”并添加到此处。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No "Maybe" titles yet. Click + Add to track something you're considering.
ast.target: 暂无“待定”标题。点击 + 添加以追踪您正在考虑的内容。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No titles in Upcoming. Click + Add to track airing schedules.
ast.target: 即将播出中暂无标题。点击 + 添加以追踪播出时间表。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No upcoming titles match your search.
ast.target: 没有即将播出的标题匹配您的搜索。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Titles with 0 or 1 total episodes will be treated as a single release date, like a movie.
ast.target: 总集数为0或1的标题将被视为单一发行日期，例如电影。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No custom columns. Click "+ Add column" to add one.
ast.target: 暂无自定义列。点击“+ 添加列”来添加一列。

ast.name: text
ast.source: These columns are pre-populated when creating a new list. The Name column is always added automatically.
ast.target: 这些列在创建新列表时会预先填充。“名称”列会自动添加。

ast.name: text
ast.source: ⚠ This is a draft list. Titles here are not included in any stats or counts.
ast.target: ⚠ 这是一个草稿列表。此处的标题不计入任何统计或计数。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Select a CSV file to import
ast.target: 选择要导入的 CSV 文件

ast.name: text
ast.source: You can close this window — import will continue in the background.
ast.target: 您可以关闭此窗口——导入将在后台继续进行。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Match each WatchLog field to a column from your CSV. Select "Skip" to leave a field empty.
ast.target: 将每个 WatchLog 字段映射到您 CSV 中的一列。选择“跳过”以留空该字段。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Rows with empty fields will be skipped automatically. If you see missing titles, check that your CSV has no empty rows at the top.
ast.target: 包含空字段的行将被自动跳过。如果您看到标题缺失，请检查您的 CSV 顶部是否有空行。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Some values in your CSV were not recognized. Map each to an existing value, or choose how to handle it.
ast.target: 您 CSV 中的一些值未被识别。请将每个值映射到一个现有值，或选择如何处理它。

ast.name: text
ast.source: You can close settings — regeneration continues in the background.
ast.target: 您可以关闭设置——重新生成将在后台继续进行。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Anime data uses the Jikan API (jikan.moe) — a free public MyAnimeList wrapper. No API key required.
ast.target: 动漫数据使用 Jikan API (jikan.moe) — 一个免费的公共 MyAnimeList 封装器。无需 API 密钥。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Get a free API key at
ast.target: 在以下网址获取免费 API 密钥：

ast.name: text
ast.source: Colors cycle through seasons in order (Season 1 = color 1, etc.).
ast.target: 颜色按季度顺序循环（第 1 季 = 颜色 1，依此类推）。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Status names are locked. Only the color can be changed.
ast.target: 状态名称已锁定。只能更改颜色。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Built-in types are locked. Custom types can be added and removed.
ast.target: 内置类型已锁定。可以添加和删除自定义类型。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Insert widgets into notes using the "WatchLog: Insert widget" command. Configure the keyboard shortcut in Obsidian Settings → Hotkeys.
ast.target: 使用“WatchLog: 插入小组件”命令将小组件插入笔记中。在 Obsidian 设置 → 快捷键中配置键盘快捷键。

ast.name: text
ast.source: wl-upcoming: only "next" or "next full" is supported.

ast.name: text
ast.source: Pin a title to set it as now watching.
ast.target: 固定一个标题以将其设置为正在观看。

ast.name: title
ast.source: This title already exists in your Watchlist
ast.target: 此标题已存在于您的观看列表中
